highlights: Lead cross-functional frontend and Shopify app development teams with a focus on scalable architecture.
Defined technical roadmap for headless e-commerce builds, aligning engineering milestones with business goals.
Conduct regular code reviews, establish development standards, and mentor junior and mid-level engineers.
Delivered 10+ production-grade web applications across e-commerce, real estate, retail, and entertainment verticals for US, UK, AU, and Middle East clients.
Led frontend architecture for Coty Inc.'s multi-brand, multi-region Shopify storefronts serving 15+ countries.
Built O'Reilly Auto Parts microfrontend platform handling millions of monthly visitors with SSR/SSG.
Developed Redsea's headless e-commerce platform and UMG's Shopify Checkout Extension.
Built reusable core React component library for a meeting scheduling SaaS platform.
Optimised application performance for speed and scalability under concurrent user load.
Collaborated with design and backend teams to build responsive UI solutions for client-facing web applications.
